description: Style Note A brand known world over for its classic cuts and impeccable quality standards fcuk definitely delivers the goods with this casual shirt. Its pure cotton composition wicks away sweat lets you stay comfortable in Summer. Pair it with oxford shoes and crisp trousers for look that exudes confidence. Product Details White shirt, has a spread collar, full buttoned placket, back yoke, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, two patch pockets on the chest with buttoned flaps where the buttons are concealed, brand tag on the side above the hemline and a curved hemline Material and Care 100% cotton Wash with similar colours Iron on reverse Size and Fit Regular Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
